scope: Extends every FINS/HLS/PS/EDU/nonprofit vertical (21 total) with two new sub-flow use cases behind ?usecase=auth-fabric and ?usecase=intake. Default 5-scene canonical story unchanged.
rationale: The canonical 5-scene story is the headline; auth-fabric and intake-mechanics are the focused shorts that show Maestro doing differentiated orchestration work. Auth-fabric reproduces the original eMoney/Steve fraud-risk demo's central move: CLEAR fires at PORTAL LOGIN to establish a biometric proof of identity at the session level, then in-portal actions inherit that proof — no second IDV. Agreement Desk re-emerges in Scene 3 as the chain-of-custody viewer that links the auth event and the transaction event into a continuous identity thread. Intake-mechanics replaces Agreement Desk inbound with a webform-and-package mechanic. Three demos per vertical, one shell, one URL parameter.
reference_demo: Original fraud/risk demo (uploads/index.html). Key narrative beats from F0-F4 scenes preserved: (F0) The Chain of Custody Gap problem statement; (F1) Authenticated Portal Entry — CLEAR at login creates biometric proof of identity; (F2) In-portal action with Maestro-served webform that inherits the F1 proof; (F3) Agreement Desk shows auth+transaction linked as continuous identity thread; (F4 optional) IAM for Fraud — Risk-Scaling Auth Visual showing CLEAR/SMS/OTP/biometric spectrum.
agreement_desk_role: Across ALL three demo modes, Agreement Desk functions as a PROXY INTERFACE for Maestro orchestration. The actual orchestration work (risk-detect, IDV-invoke, identity-bind, form-serve, audit-link, package-fan-out) happens invisibly in the Maestro layer. Agreement Desk is the on-screen surface that makes that invisible work visible to the demo audience. Same template, different Maestro lens per demo: canonical = intake fan-out lens; auth-fabric = chain-of-custody binding lens; intake-mechanics = package fan-out lens. This is why one template can play multiple narrative roles without breaking.

shell_changes_required: Read ?usecase= param at boot, default to 'default'
Prefer v.usecases?.[usecase]?.scenes over v.scenes when usecase is set
Add 6 new HOTSPOTS keys: portal_clear_idv, portal_webform, portal_submit, webform_intake, maestro_package, envelope_deliver
Create new iframe templates: docusign-portal-shell.html (modes=clear-idv|webform|submit), docusign-webform-intake.html, docusign-maestro-package.html
architecture.verticals_object_extension: Each VERTICALS[key] gains optional `usecases` sub-object with shape: { 'auth-fabric': { subtitle, scenes: [3 entries] }, 'intake': { subtitle, scenes: [3 or 4 entries] } }

auth-fabric.optional_scene_4: IAM for Fraud — Risk-Scaling Auth Visual (concept frame from original demo's F4)
auth-fabric.key_narrative_move: CLEAR fires at portal LOGIN (not at the sensitive action). Subsequent in-session actions inherit the biometric proof — no second IDV. Agreement Desk in Scene 3 links the two witnessed events as a continuous identity thread.

abstract_beats.tag_format: SCENE 1 OF 3 · AUTHENTICATED PORTAL ENTRY · CLEAR AT THE DOOR
abstract_beats.core_idea: CLEAR establishes biometric proof of identity at session level — before any transaction.
abstract_beats: Customer hits the vertical's portal login (username + password)
Maestro intercepts and invokes CLEAR — tenant-branded step-up modal
CLEAR session opens on customer's phone — no app download
ID + selfie + biometric match runs
Authenticated session opens; biometric proof bound to the session — witness event #1 logged

abstract_beats.tag_format: SCENE 2 OF 3 · IN-SESSION ACTION · MAESTRO SERVES WEBFORM
abstract_beats.core_idea: In-portal action triggers a Maestro-served webform — inherits the F1 proof, no second IDV.
abstract_beats: Inside the authenticated session, customer initiates the sensitive action (vertical-specific)
Maestro renders a dynamic webform inline — pre-filled from IDV-bound identity and action context
Customer reviews/edits any policy-required fields
Iris pre-screens for anomalies/policy violations
Submit fires — bound to the existing biometric proof — witness event #2 logged

abstract_beats.tag_format: SCENE 3 OF 3 · CHAIN OF CUSTODY · AGREEMENT DESK LINKS THE TWO EVENTS
abstract_beats.core_idea: Agreement Desk re-emerges as the chain-of-custody viewer — surfaces auth event + transaction event linked as a continuous identity thread.
abstract_beats: Agreement Desk opens to the customer's session activity
Auth event (CLEAR session) and transaction event (in-portal submission) shown in single view
Explicit link: 'Verified by CLEAR · <name> · <ID> · <time>' → '<transaction> · <amount/details> · <time>'
Iris confirms pattern match or flags anomaly
Defensible record. Chain-of-custody gap closed.

intake.use_workspaces_tail_when: Vertical has an ongoing customer relationship (most do); skip for transactional verticals (slgov-311)

abstract_beats: Sender (internal employee) OR customer (self-service) opens the webform
Selections drive what fields/products appear (dynamic)
Pre-fill from systems of record
Configuration choices summarize the package shape
Submit triggers Maestro orchestration
Maestro pulls the right document templates based on selections
Documents pre-fill from systems of record
Recipient routing built from configuration
Optional sub-routes (compliance disclosures, custodian-specific docs) auto-attach
Envelope ready
Tenant-branded email to recipient
Signing ceremony with all docs in order
Identity verified at signing time (CLEAR if needed)
Multi-recipient routing (if applicable)
Execution confirmed; certified copy issued

abstract_beats.tag_format: SCENE 4 OF 4 · WORKSPACE TAIL · ONGOING RELATIONSHIP
abstract_beats: Customer/recipient gets Workspace invite
Engagement summary visible to all parties
Iris in rail; activity log shows full Maestro fan-out
Background tasks (KYC, eligibility, etc.) running
Relationship in motion

auth-fabric.outcome: Transfer queued for execution; Iris anomaly check

intake.package_contents: IMA + Pershing custodial agreement + Reg BI disclosure
Loan agreement + security agreement + UCC-1 + personal guaranty
intake.note: D-archetype: Workspaces tail is a deal room, not just relationship Workspace

intake.package_contents: Application + binder + dec page + mortgagee notice

auth-fabric.trigger: Post-claim payment redirect or contingent beneficiary add

intake.webform_purpose: Claim file configuration from inbound death notice
intake.package_contents: Proof of loss + payment election + tax forms
intake.note: Bridges the C-archetype canonical (inbound death notice) with the A-archetype intake mechanic

auth-fabric.outcome: Claim diary updates; photos attached to file

intake.package_contents: FNOL packet + investigation routing + sworn statement

auth-fabric.trigger: $50k external transfer setup to new account

intake.package_contents: Account opening docs + ACH funding auth + signature card
IRA + joint + family trust + advisory agreement
intake.note: D-archetype: Workspaces tail is the relationship room

auth-fabric.outcome: Refill queued for prescriber e-sig (DEA-grade IDV)

intake.package_contents: HIPAA + financial responsibility + new-patient consent + insurance verify

auth-fabric.webform_purpose: SAE report with subject + event details

intake.webform_purpose: Site-config webform — protocol + IRB + budget tier
intake.package_contents: CTA + budget + 1572 + IRB approval + financial disclosure

auth-fabric.trigger: Prior authorization for a specialty drug

intake.package_contents: Enrollment + ID card + welcome kit

auth-fabric.trigger: Revoke or modify the records release scope

intake.actor: Renata (HIM specialist) — internal-side intake from inbound request
intake.webform_purpose: HIM intake from inbound ROI request
intake.package_contents: Consent + retrieval order + redaction instructions
intake.note: Bridges C-archetype canonical with A-archetype intake mechanic

intake.package_contents: Determination packet + DD auth + work-search agreement
Application + plan check + fee authorization

auth-fabric.trigger: Track portfolio of open requests + add a follow-up

intake.package_contents: Dispatch packet + work-order generation

auth-fabric.trigger: Change of household composition or income

intake.package_contents: Application + verification asks + household attestation

auth-fabric.outcome: Eligibility re-evaluated; recert date may shift

intake.package_contents: Tailored recert packet with audit-reason verification questions
intake.note: Canonical IS Maestro-triggered; intake here is the exception path

intake.package_contents: Onboarding packet + W-9 + COI request + DEI attestations
intake.note: Canonical IS Maestro-triggered renewal; intake here is new-vendor path

intake.webform_purpose: Onboarding kick-off for new hire (manual path)
intake.package_contents: Offer + I-9 + W-4 + benefits enrollment + equipment request
intake.note: Canonical IS background-check-triggered; intake here is the proactive HR path

auth-fabric.trigger: Annual license renewal + outdoor seating amendment

intake.webform_purpose: Restaurant license application via applicant portal
intake.package_contents: License app + attestation + fee + inspection checklist

auth-fabric.trigger: Official transcript release to a graduate program (FERPA-sensitive)
auth-fabric.webform_purpose: Transcript release authorization — recipient + scope + custodian acknowledgment
auth-fabric.note: FERPA gives the regulatory rationale for CLEAR at login (parallel to DEA in provider auth-fabric)

intake.webform_purpose: Financial-aid acceptance via student portal — aid package + loan tier + parent-PLUS election
intake.package_contents: Award letter + Master Promissory Note + entrance counseling cert + parent-PLUS application + FERPA disclosure
intake.note: Multi-party (student + parent + financial-aid office); different scope from canonical 5-scene general onboarding

auth-fabric.trigger: Quarterly grant drawdown request (financial-controls + impersonation surface)
auth-fabric.webform_purpose: Drawdown request — line-item attestation, expended-amount certification, planned-spend disclosure
auth-fabric.outcome: Drawdown queued for Harbor program officer release
auth-fabric.note: High analogue to wealth's high-value transfer auth-fabric — financial-controls + fraud surface + regulator-relevant chain of custody

intake.webform_purpose: New-grant configuration — organization + project scope + budget tier + reporting cadence + equity riders
intake.package_contents: Master grant agreement + SOW + budget detail + reporting requirements + indemnification + equity rider

follow_up_note: 3 verticals (wealth, provider, slgov-recertification) are fully baked in the strategy memo. The remaining 18 verticals × 2 use cases = 36 narrations remain to author. Per-vertical specs above are the briefs; bulk-author batch produces full scene narration (tag, head, lede, 5 beats per scene × 3 scenes per use case = 15 narrated beats per use case). Total scope: 21 verticals × 2 use cases = 42 new use case scripts.
